title: Vegetable Man
description: You’ll want to make sure you’re eating your veggies.
altHero: vegetable man, a scary man covered in veggies, in the grocery store
alt1: woman browsing vegetables at the grocery store
alt2: a man’s eye peeking out of a pile of green peppers
alt3: woman holding a green pepper and screaming
alt4: vegetable man chasing the woman through the store
